description_long: This is a classic hot dog featuring a plump sausage nestled inside a golden-brown, toasted bun. The sausage is generously topped with a zigzag of creamy yellow mustard and white mayonnaise, with a strip of crispy bacon peeking out from the sides. The bun appears soft yet slightly crisped on the outside, with visible browning from toasting. The hot dog is served on a piece of brown parchment paper, which adds a casual, street-food vibe. The condiments are applied in a decorative pattern, enhancing the visual appeal and suggesting a freshly prepared, appetizing snack.
description: A toasted bun holds a sausage topped with mustard, mayonnaise, and bacon, served on brown parchment paper. The hot dog looks fresh, with condiments applied in a zigzag pattern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the toasted bun's golden-brown exterior and bacon protruding from the left side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sausage, zigzag condiments, and bacon strip, with the bun slightly open.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the toasted bun and the sausage extending out, with condiments visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the exposed sausage tip, condiments, and bacon, with the bun enclosing the back.
